subject: Geography
title: Coral Atolls
description: A quick win: understand Coral Atolls.

hook.text: A coral atoll is a ring of reef with a lagoon in the middle and no land above it.

buildup.text: Darwin figured out how: a volcanic island sinks, but coral keeps growing upward around it.

discovery.text: The Maldives are coral atolls—1,192 islands averaging just 1.5 meters above sea level.

twist.text: The original volcano is long gone. Only the coral skeleton remains, forming a ring.

climax.text: Rising seas threaten to submerge atolls entirely within this century.

punchline.text: Built by tiny animals on sinking volcanoes.

quiz.question: How do coral atolls form?
options: Coral grows around a sinking volcano
